description: Discovered techniques and approaches for quality improvement. Updated 2026-02-19 with comprehensive literature survey.

methods.name: CFG Guidance x Rescale Interaction
methods.description: Higher CFG guidance works better with higher rescale (0.95). Low rescale with high guidance is the worst combination. The interaction is non-linear.

details.pattern: rescale importance increases with guidance level

methods.name: Sparse Boundary Nearest-Neighbor Fallback
methods.description: grid_sample_3d at sparse voxel boundaries interpolates toward zero. Fix: detect dark texels near boundary and replace with nearest valid neighbor.

methods.name: Bilateral Filter Sharpening
methods.description: Use bilateral filter (edge-preserving) instead of Gaussian for texture sharpening. CLAHE is bad for 3D textures (too much local noise).

details.order: HF inject BEFORE sharpen, cleanup after every noise op

methods.name: Tangent-Space Normal Map Baking
methods.description: Bake normal maps from high-res mesh to simplified mesh. Uses BVH closest-point lookup + tangent frame projection.

details.improvement: +5.5 pts avg in previous manual tests

methods.name: nvdiffrast Render-and-Compare Texture Optimization
methods.description: Use differentiable rendering (nvdiffrast) to optimize texture by comparing rendered views against input images. Iterative gradient descent on texture pixels. The single highest-impact improvement available without retraining.
methods.source: Meta 3D TextureGen, MVPaint, DiffTex, Paint3D, industry standard

details.infrastructure: nvdiffrast already in Dockerfile; need optimization loop with camera poses

methods.name: PBR-SR Zero-Shot Texture Super-Resolution
methods.description: Zero-shot PBR texture SR using DiffBIR + nvdiffrast multi-view consistency. Upscale from 2K to 4K+ with perceptual quality enhancement. No training needed.

details.expected_improvement: +3-5 points on detail score, +1-2 on color

methods.name: UV Seam Laplacian Blending
methods.description: Smooth texture across UV seam boundaries using Laplacian blending. Identify UV seam edges, dilate texture past island boundaries, blend in narrow band (2-4 texels).

details.approach: Build UV adjacency map, average across-seam neighbors, Gaussian blur in narrow seam band

methods.name: TAPA Smooth Multi-View Blending
methods.description: Smooth TAPA blending over [0.6, 0.8] range for texture multi-view. Better than hard switching.

methods.name: Cross-Attention Feature Concatenation
methods.description: Concatenate K views' DINOv3 features along sequence dim for cross-attention. Avoids velocity averaging problem entirely.

details.memory: K=4 at 512 res = 5476 KV tokens vs ~50K Q tokens, feasible
details.risk: OOD sequence length; mitigate with alpha=0.1-0.3 scaling

methods.name: CFG-MP: Manifold Projection for Flow Matching
methods.description: Reformulates CFG as homotopy optimization with manifold constraint. Projects sample back onto data manifold after each Euler step via incremental gradient descent. Uses Anderson Acceleration for efficiency. Unlike CFG-Zero*/APG, constrains the entire trajectory rather than just modifying guidance scale/direction.

details.key_advantage: Addresses off-manifold drift, different mechanism from CFG-Zero*/APG which showed no effect
details.implementation: 5-15 lines in Euler sampling loop, no extra model evaluations

methods.name: Rectified-CFG++: Predictor-Corrector for Flow Models
methods.description: Adaptive predictor-corrector guidance coupling rectified flow deterministic efficiency with geometry-aware conditioning. Each step: conditional RF update + weighted conditional correction. Bounded trajectory in data manifold tubular neighbourhood.
methods.source: CVPR Workshop on Generative Vision 2025, NeurIPS 2025

details.expected_improvement: +1-3 points, especially at high guidance scales

methods.name: Logit-Normal Timestep Scheduling
methods.description: Replace uniform timestep spacing in Euler ODE solver with logit-normal distribution concentrating steps around the critical transition region (t~0.5 where log SNR~0). Used in SD3 and Movie Gen training; applicable inference-time to any flow matching model.
methods.source: ICCV 2025, SD3 (Esser et al. 2024), Movie Gen (Polyak et al. 2024)

details.rationale: More ODE steps in critical region improves structural decisions

methods.name: DetailGen3D: Generative Geometry Enhancement
methods.description: Models coarse-to-fine geometric transformation through data-dependent flows in latent space. Token matching for spatial correspondence during refinement. Inference takes seconds. DINO feature conditioning compatible with TRELLIS.2.

details.expected_improvement: +3-5 points on detail and contour scores

methods.name: SuperCarver: Normal Diffusion Geometry SR
methods.description: Prior-guided normal diffusion model for geometry super-resolution. Noise-resistant inverse rendering via deformable distance field. Adds micro-geometry detail lost in mesh simplification.

methods.name: MeshAnything V2: Clean Mesh Topology
methods.description: Autoregressive transformer generating artist-quality mesh topology aligned to input shapes. Adjacent Mesh Tokenization (AMT) halves token sequence length. Up to 1600 faces.

details.limitation: 1600-face limit may be too low for detailed objects
details.expected_improvement: +1-3 points on quality, significant for production use

methods.name: Material Anything: Feed-Forward PBR Refinement
methods.description: Feed-forward PBR material generation using pre-trained diffusion model with triple-head architecture (albedo, roughness, metallic) and rendering loss. Confidence masks handle textured/texture-less objects. UV-space material refiner.

methods.name: MVPaint UV Refinement Module
methods.description: UV-space super-resolution + spatial-aware seam-smoothing from MVPaint. Addresses UV seams and texture resolution independently of generation method.

details.expected_improvement: +3-5 points on texture coherence and seam quality

methods.name: 3DEnhancer: Multi-View Diffusion Enhancement
methods.description: DiT-based multi-view enhancement with row attention and epipolar aggregation. Text-prompt controllable, adjustable noise levels. Render from coarse 3D -> enhance -> reproject.

methods.name: Elevate3D: HFS-SDEdit Co-Refinement
methods.description: Frequency-separated SDEdit for iterative texture-geometry co-refinement. Diffusion freely generates low-freq content while constraining high-freq from input. Monocular geometry predictors for mesh refinement.

methods.name: 3D-Aware RoPE Position Encoding
methods.description: Inject 3D spatial information into rotary position embeddings for cross-view coherence. Significantly improves cross-view consistency and seamless texturing. Requires retraining.

methods.name: MS3D: Multi-Scale Sparse Voxel Progressive Refinement
methods.description: Progressive multi-scale modeling from low-res full latents to high-res sparse structured latents. Hierarchical latent aggregation for SDF extraction. The most architecturally relevant improvement for TRELLIS.2.

methods.name: CFD: 3D-Consistent Noise for Flow Matching
methods.description: Multi-view consistent Gaussian noise rendered from various viewpoints for consistent flow gradients. Applicable to TRELLIS.2's texture stage: use 3D noise field instead of independent per-voxel noise.

methods.name: PartUV: Part-Based UV Unwrapping
methods.description: Learned part priors + geometric cues for part-aligned UV charts. Reduces fragmentation vs xatlas, minimizes padding between charts, prevents color bleeding at lower resolutions.

details.advantage: Semantically meaningful UV islands, fewer seams

methods.name: CraftsMan3D Normal-Based Geometry Refiner
methods.description: Normal-based geometry refiner predicts per-vertex displacements guided by rendered multi-view normal maps. Can be applied automatically to any mesh.

methods.name: DiffBIR: Blind Texture Restoration
methods.description: Two-stage blind image restoration: degradation removal + latent diffusion texture generation. Effective at natural textures and semantic preservation. The 2D prior backbone for PBR-SR.

methods.name: FlashAttention-3 Upgrade
methods.description: Async + FP8 attention for Hopper/Blackwell GPUs. 1.5-2x speedup over FA2, enabling more sampling steps or higher resolution within same time budget.
